CLOU.name: CLOU
CLOU.reasoning: Highest scanner conviction (7.0) with a clear cloud capex tailwind confirmed by Google's earnings beat. Diversified cloud ETF reduces single-name risk while capturing the secular hyperscaler spend cycle.

AVGO.name: AVGO
AVGO.reasoning: Record revenue with strong AI networking/custom silicon franchise and balanced RSI offers entry without chasing. Buffett-style: durable moat, strong cash generation, dominant in AI connectivity.

ARKX.name: ARKX
ARKX.reasoning: Provides non-semiconductor diversification (space/aerospace innovation) while still RISK-ON aligned. Outperforming JETS with higher returns and an oversold-neutral RSI gives an attractive non-correlated tilt.

TSM.name: TSM
TSM.reasoning: Foundry monopoly with pristine balance sheet and the most direct, durable beneficiary of AI silicon demand. Earnings beat confirms the fundamental thesis with reasonable valuation versus peers.

GOOGL.name: GOOGL
GOOGL.reasoning: Alphabet offers a pristine balance sheet, dominant search/cloud franchise, and AI monetization optionality (Gemini) at a reasonable valuation. Adds mega-cap software/internet exposure that meaningfully diversifies away from the portfolio's current semiconductor concentration (AVGO/TSM/CLOU).

MSFT.name: MSFT
MSFT.reasoning: Microsoft pairs Buffett-grade balance sheet quality with the strongest enterprise AI distribution via Azure and the renewed OpenAI partnership. The deeply oversold RSI (34.9) on a STRONG BUY franchise offers an attractive mean-reversion entry into a high-quality non-semi name.
